prompt: Genera la Unidad 1 de Lengua y Literatura 5to EGB titulada 'Explorando la narrativa' con 2 temas, usando la matriz A&S proporcionada con destrezas DZ-LENG-5-001 a DZ-LENG-5-004.
expected_output: Complete editorial unit with all 4 sections (apertura, desarrollo with 2 themes each having 4 phases, cierre, evaluacion). Every paragraph tagged with DZ-ref. Inserciones curriculares present.
expectations: Unit contains Apertura section with 'Me preparo para mis competencias', 'Seguridad Integral', and 'Piensa y Reflexiona'
Desarrollo contains 2 themes, each with Experiencia, Conceptualizacion, Reflexion, Aplicacion phases
Cierre contains 'Construyo mi Aprendizaje', 'Mi emocion cuenta', and 'Ponte pilas'
Evaluacion contains both formative and summative items
Every content paragraph has a [REF: DZ-LENG-5-XXX] tag
At least one ODS reference, one INS-SE section, one INS-SI tip present

prompt: Genera una unidad para Matematica 6to EGB con 3 destrezas. Al final, incluye una tabla de trazabilidad mostrando donde aparece cada destreza.
expected_output: Editorial unit with traceability summary table at the end mapping each DZ code to the sections where it appears. All 3 destrezas should appear in both content and evaluation.
expectations: Traceability table present at end of unit
All 3 DZ codes appear in the traceability table
Each DZ code appears in at least one content section and one evaluation item
Taxonomy progression visible (earlier phases use lower Bloom levels)

prompt: Genera la unidad 3 de Ciencias Naturales 7mo EGB sin proporcionar la Matriz A&S.
expected_output: Error response explaining that the Matriz A&S is required before unit generation. Should suggest running generate-matrix first. Should not produce a unit without curricular alignment.
expectations: Response indicates Matriz A&S is required
Does not generate unit content without matrix
Explains that content without curricular alignment fails Gate G1
